# Market Research Agent SOP
Standard Operating Procedure for autonomous market analysis.

## Execution Pipeline
1. Discovery: [steps/step-1-discovery.md](./steps/step-1-discovery.md)
2. Synthesis: [steps/step-2-synthesis.md](./steps/step-2-synthesis.md)
3. Reporting: [steps/step-3-reporting.md](./steps/step-3-reporting.md)
